---
title: "Blog"
page-layout: full
include-before-body: ../assets/html/particles-embed.html
include-after-body: ../assets/html/particles-scripts.html
listing:
  contents: "[0-9]*.qmd"
  type: grid
  categories: true
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [title, description, categories, date]
toc: false
---

::: {.prose-glass}
A growing collection of quantitative economics exercises. Replications and extensions
of public empirical work from central banks, academic papers, and primary research,
built on public data.
:::
